summary: User Lookup | Select July to November Date Range and Search
gherkin:
When the user navigate to User Lookup page
And the user click on "Select A Date Range" button
And the user navigate to July and select July 1st by clicking on the previous button on the calendar
And the user navigate to November and select November 30th by clicking on the next button on the calendar
And the user enter "dm5tv@gmail.com" and click Search
Then the User Lookup page loads successfully
And the Calendar dropdown appears
And July 1st is selected as start date
And November 30th is selected as end date
And the search executes successfully with date range and the user verify search results are displayed
And the User Information table and External Logs are shown

steps.action:
*When* the user navigate to User Lookup page    

*And* the user click on "Select A Date Range" button   

*And* the user navigate to July and select July 1st by clicking on the previous button on the calendar

*And* the user navigate to November and select November 30th by clicking on the next button on the calendar

*And* the user enter "[dm5tv@gmail.com|mailto:dm5tv@gmail.com]" and click Search
steps.result:
*Then* the User Lookup page loads successfully

*And* the Calendar dropdown appears

*And* July 1st is selected as start date

*And* November 30th is selected as end date

*And* the search executes successfully with date range and the user verify search results are displayed

*And* the User Information table and External Logs are shown
